top_signals.title: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thoma Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
top_signals.summary: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BP CEO Shakes Up Structure in Push Back to Oil and Gas
top_signals.summary: New BP Plc Chief Executive Officer Meg O’Neill reorganized the oil giant’s leadership and reporting structures in an overhaul that cements the company’s focus on oil and gas as it tries to move beyond recent boardroom drama.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
